description.value: **Benefit:** As a standard action, you can cast a ray spell that requires a ranged touch attack and deliver the effect through your melee weapon, either through a melee attack or as a ranged attack. If you deliver this spell as a melee attack, this functions as the magus spellstrike ability. If you deliver the spell as a ranged attack, the spell is a ranged touch attack that discharges from your weapon and applies the weaponâs enhancement bonus to the spellâs damage. When fired in this way, the spell uses the weaponâs critical threat range, but the spell effect deals only Ã2 damage on a successful critical hit. You can use a ranged touch attack spell that targets more than one creature (such as scorching ray ), but you make only one attack through your weapon to deliver one ranged touch effect; additional ranged touch attacks from the spell are wasted and have no effect.
